title: Lootr Prettyfied
description: Prettyfied versions of Lootr chests and barrels. Includes gold version!
body:
[![CurseForge](https://i.imgur.com/eBmLp7F.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mjramon) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/FMq4hOj.png)](https://modrinth.com/organization/aegis-architectum) [![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/v0q5sfn.png)](https://discord.gg/fWW4Atmr69)

Are you tired of same Lootr look? Do you want fresh, vanilla-like textures that will add even more excitement? You are at the right place!
Changes the look of Lootr chests and barrels. Comes in two variants.

## Standard Edition
![Standard Edition: Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ilKNKA7J/images/25cad8b97be6eb156a9d5ee0939847f992e4ea50.png)
![Standard Edition: Barrel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ilKNKA7J/images/9498381d4b221c14fecfb17cb1296cecfb8ac1b7.png)

## Gold Edition
![Gold Edition: Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ilKNKA7J/images/a7eaaea09f075b738a680fdea4a69751e417776c.png)
![Gold Edition: Barrel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ilKNKA7J/images/3611a6c2b7761487f1790987fb4f1f3056c5d79e.png)


## REQUIREMENTS
- [Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr)
